Feats-All — Female Half-Elf Ranger: 10
Strength: 18 (+4) Dexterity: 17 (+3) Constitution: 17 (+3) Intelligence: 13 (+1) Wisdom: 19 (+4) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Entertainer Alignment: Chaotic Evil Deity: Norse-Uller (CN)
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Constitution: 2; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 2; Wisdom: 1 Experience: 82073/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 35 Carry/Lift: 270/540
Ability Notes:
Chef: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Wisdom)
Crusher: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Fey Touched (Wisdom): +1 Wisdom
Gunner: +1 Dexterity
Half-Elf Ability Adjustment: +2 Charisma/Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Piercer: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Roving: +5 Speed
Shadow Touched: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Charisma, Intelligence, Wisdom)
Skill Expert: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Slasher: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Telekinetic (Charisma): +1 Charisma
Telepathic (Intelligence): +1 Intelligence
Ability Boosts: 8 to distribute
Land's Stride: Can move normally through nonmagical difficult terrain and plants
Roving: Has a 35' climb Speed and a 35' swim Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2 Selectable Feature Count: Ranger (Fighting Style): 1; Ranger (Ranger Archetype): 1; Sorcerer (Metamagic): 2; Warlock (Eldritch Invocation): 1
Feats: Artificer Initiate; Chef; Crusher; Eldritch Adept; Fey Touched (Wisdom); Fighting Initiate; Gunner; Metamagic Adept; Piercer; Poisoner; Shadow Touched; Skill Expert; Slasher; Telekinetic (Charisma); Telepathic (Intelligence) Half-Elf Features: Darkvision; Fey Ancestry; Half-Elf Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Elvish; Choose 1 from any); Skill Versatility Warlock Features: Eldritch Spear Sorcerer Features: Distant Spell; Subtle Spell Ranger Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Beast Master; Canny; Deft Explorer; Exceptional Training; Extra Attack; Favored Foe; Fighting Style (Dueling); Fighting Style; Land's Stride; Martial Versatility; Nature's Veil; Primal Awareness; Ranger Archetype; Ranger's Companion; Roving; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival); Spellcasting Focus; Spellcasting; Tireless; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Entertainer Features: By Popular Demand; Skill Proficiency (Acrobatics; Performance); Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument)
Feature Notes:
Deft Explorer: Has the Canny, Roving, and Tireless features
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Ranger Archetype: 1 selection
Darkvision: R60' Sees one light level better
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +11 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +7
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +5 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +8 Medicine: (wis) +4 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +7 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +1 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) +8
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Athletics; Deception; Insight; Investigation; Performance; Religion; Survival
Expertise: Acrobatics
Tool Proficiency: Cook's Utensils; Disguise Kit; Flute; Poisoner's Kit; Smith's Tools
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Elvish; Halfling; Primordial
Skill Notes:
Artificer Initiate: Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan)
Canny: Language (Choose 2 from any)
Chef: Tool Proficiency (Cook's Utensils)
Poisoner: Tool Proficiency (Poisoner's Kit)
Skill Expert: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Expertise (Choose 1 from any Skill)
Skill Versatility: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)
By Popular Demand: Can receive welcome and lodging in exchange for performing
Canny: +4 on a chosen proficient skill
Poisoner: 1 hr process using a Poisoner's Kit creates 4 poison doses
Telepathic (Intelligence): R60' Can communicate telepathically in a shared language
Combat
Hit Points: 70 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 13
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Firearms; Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Blowgun (+7 1+3 P R25/100); Greatclub (+8 1d8+4 B); Mace (+8 1d6+4 B); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+4 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +30
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Fighting Initiate: Knows 1 Fighting Style
Gunner: Weapon Proficiency (Firearms)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +4
Strength Damage Adjustment: +4
Crusher: Can move a foe up to 1 size larger 5' with a bludgeoning hit once per turn, and a critical bludgeoning hit gives advantage on attacks on that foe until the start of the next turn
Exceptional Training: Can use a bonus action to command companion to Dash, Disengage, or Help instead of Attack/Companion attacks count as magical
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Favored Foe: Can mark a target with a successful attack for concentration up to 1 min 4 times per long rest; the first hit each turn on a marked foe inflicts +1d6 HP weapon damage
Fighting Initiate: Can replace a Fighting Style when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Fighting Style (Dueling): Inflicts +2 HP with a single, one-handed melee weapon
Gunner: Loading does not slow firearm attacks, and being adjacent to a foe does not inflict disadvantage on ranged attacks
Martial Versatility: Can replace a Fighting Style when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Piercer: Can reroll 1 piercing damage die once per turn, and critical hits with piercing weapons inflict 1 additional die of damage
Poisoner: Attacks ignore poison resistance/Can use a bonus action to coat a weapon or a piece of ammunition with poison lasting 1 min that inflicts 2d8 HP poison and poisoned (save DC 14 Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Ranger's Companion: Companion beast of up to CR 1/4, with the higher of 40 or its maximum normal hit points, obeys commands and gains +4 Armor Class, attack, damage, and proficient skills and saving throws
Slasher: Can inflict -10 Speed until the start of the next turn with a slashing attack once per turn, and a critical slashing hit inflicts disadvantage on the foe's attacks until the start of the next turn
Telekinetic (Charisma): R30' Can use a bonus action to move a target 5' (save DC 15 Strength negates)
Tireless: Can gain 1d8+4 temporary hit points 4 times per long rest, and a short rest reduces exhaustion by 1
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +7; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +8; Wisdom: +4
Save Notes:
Fey Ancestry: Has advantage vs. charm and immunity to magical sleep
Land's Stride: Has advantage vs. impeding plants
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: R: 6 Spell Slots: A0: 2; A1: 1; R1: 4; R2: 3; R3: 2 Attack: A: +5; Fey Touched Wisdom: +8; R: +8; Shadow Touched: +5; Telekinetic Charisma: +7; Telepathic Intelligence: +5 Spell DC: A: 13; Fey Touched Wisdom: 16; R: 16; Shadow Touched: 13; Telekinetic Charisma: 15; Telepathic Intelligence: 13
Spells:
Beast Sense (R2 Divi): Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Beast Sense (R2 [Primal Awareness] Divi): Self can perceive through a touched willing beast's senses for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Cordon Of Arrows (R2 Tran): R5' Four arrows or crossbow bolts attack non-designated creatures within 30', inflicting 1d6 HP piercing each (save Dexterity negates), for 8 hr [+Level affects +2 pieces]
Cure Wounds (R1 Evoc): Touched regains 1d8+4 hit points [+Level restores +1d8 hit points]
Detect Thoughts (Telepathic Intelligence2 [Telepathic (Intelligence)] Divi): R30' Reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom ends; additional contested Intelligence attempts each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 2' of rock, 2" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Disguise Self (A1 Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Elemental Weapon (R3 Tran): Touched weapon gains +1 attack and +1d4 HP damage of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level gives +2 or +3 attack and +2d4 or +3d4 damage at level 5 or 7]
Ensnaring Strike (R1 Conj): Next successful self attack restrains the foe and inflicts 1d6 HP per rd piercing (save Strength ends; Large creatures have advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Find Traps (R2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fog Cloud (R1 Conj): R120' 20' radius obscures vision for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level increases the radius by 20']
Invisibility (Shadow Touched2 [Shadow Touched] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Mage Hand (Telekinetic Charisma0 [Telekinetic (Charisma)] Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Misty Step (Fey Touched Wisdom2 [Fey Touched (Wisdom)] Conj): Teleports self 30'
Plant Growth (R3 Tran): R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 1 year
Ray Of Frost (A0 Evoc): R60' Ranged spell inflicts 2d8 HP cold and -10' Speed until the start of the next turn
Searing Smite (R1 Evoc): Next successful self melee weapon attack inflicts +1d6 HP fire, plus 1d6 HP fire per rd (save Constitution ends) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP initial]
Speak With Animals (R1 [Primal Awareness] Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Plants (R3 [Primal Awareness] Tran): Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Artificer Initiate: Knows 1 artificer cantrip and can cast a chosen A1 spell once per long rest
Eldritch Adept: Knows 1 Eldritch Invocation
Eldritch Spear: Eldritch Blast has a 300' range
Metamagic Adept: Knows 2 Metamagic options and has 2 sorcery points
Chef: Food prepared during a short rest adds 1d8 to hit points regained from using Hit Dice by 8 diners, and a 1-hr process produces 4 treats that each give 4 temporary hit points when consumed within 8 hr
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Eldritch Adept: Can replace Eldritch Invocation when gaining a level
Fey Touched (Wisdom): Can cast Misty Step and a chosen level 1 divination or enchantment spell once per long rest
Metamagic Adept: Can replace a Metamagic option when boosting an ability or taking a feat
Nature's Veil: Can use a bonus action to become invisible until the start of the next turn 4 times per long rest
Primal Awareness: Can cast Speak With Plants, Beast Sense, and Speak With Animals without expending a spell slot once each per long rest
Shadow Touched: Can cast Invisibility and a chosen level 1 illusion or necromancy spell once per long rest
Spellcasting Focus: Can use a druidic focus for ranger spells
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the ranger spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Subtle Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to cast a spell without somatic or verbal components
Telekinetic (Charisma): Can cast Mage Hand without verbal or somatic components, can make the hand invisible, and can extend its range by 30' if the spell is known from another source
Telepathic (Intelligence): Can cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 13 Wisdom negates) without using components or expending a spell slot once per long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Feat Allocation: 2 available vs. 15 allocated
